# Executives

REPLACE:BEL_John_Cockerill = {
    # John Cockerill
    first_name = "John"
    last_name = "Cockerill"
    historical = yes
    dna = dna_john_cockerill
    culture = cu:british
    birth_date = 1790.8.3
    interest_group = ig_industrialists
    ideology = ideology_moderate
	company = company:company_john_cockerill
    home_region = STATE_LANCASHIRE
    traits = {
        ambitious
        basic_political_operator
        basic_entrepreneur
    }
    executive_usage = {
        country_trigger = {
            has_dlc_feature = mp1_content
        }
        company_trigger = {
            is_company_type = company_type:company_john_cockerill
        }
        earliest_usage_date = 1836.1.1
        latest_usage_date = 1840.12.27
        #guaranteed to spawn if possible
    }
}

# Hudson's Bay Company

REPLACE:HBC_george_simpson = {
	first_name = "George"
	last_name = "Simpson"
	historical = yes
    # technically a ruler, but will be set as the ruler of HBC via the company
	culture = cu:scottish
	age = 44
	dna = dna_george_simpson
	interest_group = ig_industrialists
	ideology = ideology_moderate
    home_region = STATE_LOWLANDS
	company = company:company_hbc
	traits = {
		special_character_colonial_business
		bigoted
		explorer
	}
	executive_usage = { # Must be the country that owns the company
        country_trigger = {
            c:GBR ?= this
        }
        company_trigger = {
            is_company_type = company_type:company_hbc
        }
        earliest_usage_date = 1836.1.1
        latest_usage_date = 1860.9.7
        #guaranteed to spawn if possible
    }
}

# James FitzGibbon, member of the Family Compact and militia officer.
REPLACE:ONT_james_fitzgibbon = {
	first_name = "James"
	last_name = "FitzGibbon"
	historical = yes
	culture = cu:irish
	religion = rel:protestant # family was from Limerick, but FitzGibbon's father had converted to Protestantism in the 1780s
	birth_date = 1780.11.16
	is_general = yes
	interest_group = ig_landowners
	ideology = ideology_moderate
    home_region = STATE_MUNSTER
	traits = {
		imperious
		expensive_tastes # earnest earlier on in life, but by the 1830s he'd been getting bitter about being on the short of the stick for awards and promotions
		psychological_affliction # started having nervous breakdowns
		forest_commander
	}
}

# Peter McGill, president of the Bank of Montreal 1834-1860, member of the Lower Canada Legislative Council from 1832 to 1838, and most importantly, early railroad promotorer

	first_name = "Peter"
	last_name = "McGill"
	historical = yes
	culture = cu:scottish
	religion = rel:protestant
	birth_date = 1789.8.22 # born somewhere in August of 1789, baptized on September 1st
	ig_leader = yes
	interest_group = ig_industrialists
	ideology = ideology_moderate
    home_region = STATE_LOWLANDS
	traits = {
		pious
		grifter # in the 1850s, he rescheduled his own debt with loans from the Bank of Montreal, which he was then president of at the time
		cautious
		master_bureaucrat
	}
}

# Robert Nelson, Reformer, proclaimed President of the Republic of Lower Canada during the Lower Canada Rebellion. Technically he didn't radicalize and advocate for revolution until Nov 1837, but him as an agitator in 1836 helps amp up the radical movement at game start
REPLACE:QUE_robert_nelson = {
	first_name = "Robert"
	last_name = "Nelson"
	historical = yes
	female = no
	birth_date = 1794.1.15 # Dictionary of Canadian Biography says he was born somewhere in January of 1794, Wikipedia says he was born August 1794, and Mary Soderstrom in 1994 reckoned he was born in August 1793. Anybody who claims with certainty that they have the one true birthdate for him either has some original research or read only one source and didn't double-check that.
	culture = cu:anglo_canadian
	religion = rel:protestant
	is_agitator = yes
	interest_group = ig_intelligentsia
	ideology = ideology_radical
    home_region = STATE_QUEBEC
	traits = {
		charismatic
		wrathful
		reckless
		firebrand
	}
}

### Generated Interest Group leaders

# John A. Macdonald, first Prime Minister of Canada post-confederation
REPLACE:can_john_macdonald = {
	first_name = "John"
	last_name = "Macdonald"
	historical = yes
	role = character_role_politician
	culture = cu:anglo_canadian
	religion = rel:protestant
    home_region = STATE_ONTARIO
	birth_date = 1815.1.10

	interest_group = ig_petty_bourgeoisie
	ideology = ideology_protectionist

	traits = {
		charismatic
		tactful
		ambitious
		experienced_political_operator
	}

	interest_group_leader_usage = {
		country_trigger = {
			NOT = { is_country_type = decentralized }
			any_scope_state = {
				is_incorporated = yes
				state_region = s:STATE_ONTARIO
			}
			country_average_culture_pop_acceptance = {
				culture = cu:anglo_canadian
				value >= acceptance_status_4
			}
		}
		interest_group_trigger = {
			ig_counts_as_marginal = no
			OR = {
			   	is_interest_group_type = ig_petty_bourgeoisie
			   	is_interest_group_type = ig_industrialists
			}
		}
		earliest_usage_date = 1844.10.15 # first elected MP for Kingston in the Province of Canada
		latest_usage_date = 1887.2.22 # the 1887 Canadian General Election wasn't even his last election, but Macdonald was 72 and he should not be /appearing/ for the first time at age 72
		#guaranteed to spawn if possible
	}
}

# Sir George-Étienne Cartier, co-premier, a Father of the Confederation, named George rather than Georges because he's named after King George III
REPLACE:can_george_etienne_cartier = {
	first_name = "George-Etienne"
	last_name = "Cartier"
	historical = yes
	role = character_role_politician
	culture = cu:franco_canadian
	religion = rel:catholic
	birth_date = 1814.9.6 # died 1873.5.20
	interest_group = ig_industrialists
	ideology = ideology_protectionist
    home_region = STATE_QUEBEC
	traits = {
		tactful
		cautious
		expert_political_operator # Kingpin of the Confederation
	}

	interest_group_leader_usage = {
		country_trigger = {
			NOT = { is_country_type = decentralized }
			any_scope_state = {
				is_incorporated = yes
				state_region = s:STATE_QUEBEC
			}
			country_average_culture_pop_acceptance = {
				culture = cu:franco_canadian
				value >= acceptance_status_4
			}
		}
		interest_group_trigger = {
			ig_counts_as_marginal = no
			OR = {
				is_interest_group_type = ig_petty_bourgeoisie
				is_interest_group_type = ig_landowners
				is_interest_group_type = ig_intelligentsia
				is_interest_group_type = ig_industrialists
			}
		}
		earliest_usage_date = 1848.1.18 # elected to the 3rd Parliament of the Province of Canada in January 1848
		latest_usage_date = 1867.9.20 # last electoral victory, as MP for Montreal East following confederation
		#guaranteed to spawn if possible
	}
}

# George Brown, Reform leader and one of the Fathers of the Confederation
REPLACE:can_george_brown = {
	first_name = "George"
	last_name = "Brown"
	historical = yes
	role = character_role_politician
	culture = cu:scottish
	religion = rel:protestant
	birth_date = 1818.11.29 # died May 9th, 1880, a month after being shot in the thigh

	interest_group = ig_intelligentsia
	ideology = ideology_market_liberal
    home_region = STATE_LOWLANDS

	traits = {
		tactful
		sickly
		persistent
		literary # was also a newspaper publisher
	}

	interest_group_leader_usage = {
		country_trigger = {
			NOT = { is_country_type = decentralized }
			any_scope_state = {
				is_incorporated = yes
				state_region = s:STATE_ONTARIO
			}
			country_average_culture_pop_acceptance = {
				culture = cu:scottish
				value >= acceptance_status_4
			}
		}
		interest_group_trigger = {
			ig_counts_as_marginal = no
			OR = {
			   	is_interest_group_type = ig_petty_bourgeoisie
			   	is_interest_group_type = ig_intelligentsia
			}
		}
		earliest_usage_date = 1854.1.1 # became MP for Lambton in 1854
		latest_usage_date = 1874.1.1 # appointed to the Canadian senate
		chance = 50
	}
}

# Sir Allan Napier MacNab, joint Premier of Lower Canada from 1854 to 1856

	first_name = "Allan"
	last_name = "MacNab"
	historical = yes
	role = character_role_politician
	culture = cu:anglo_canadian
	religion = rel:protestant
	birth_date = 1798.2.19 # died 1862.8.8

	interest_group = ig_landowners
	ideology = ideology_moderate
	role = character_role_magnate
	holding_type = building_manor_house # Large land speculator
    home_region = STATE_ONTARIO

	traits = {
		grifter
		persistent
		direct
		experienced_political_operator
	}

	interest_group_leader_usage = {
		country_trigger = {
			NOT = { is_country_type = decentralized }
			any_scope_state = {
				is_incorporated = yes
				state_region = s:STATE_ONTARIO
			}
			country_average_culture_pop_acceptance = {
				culture = cu:anglo_canadian
				value >= acceptance_status_4
			}
		}
		interest_group_trigger = {
			ig_counts_as_marginal = no
			is_interest_group_type = ig_landowners
		}
		earliest_usage_date = 1838.1.1 # Knighted in 1838, was already serving in Upper Panada's parliament since 1830
		latest_usage_date = 1854.9.11 # beginning of term as Joint Premier of the Province of Canada
		#guaranteed to spawn if possible
	}
}

# Alexandre-Antonin Taché, Catholic missionary, archbishop. Participant in the First Vatican Council. Called on as a mediator by the Canadian government on several occasions
REPLACE:can_alexandre-antonin_tache = {
	first_name = "Alexandre-Antonin"
	last_name = "Tache"
	historical = yes
	ig_leader = yes
	culture= cu:franco_canadian
	religion = rel:catholic
	birth_date = 1823.7.23 # died June 22nd, 1894

	interest_group = ig_devout
	ideology = ideology_humanitarian
    home_region = STATE_QUEBEC

	traits = {
		honorable
		tactful
		pious
		basic_diplomat
	}

	interest_group_leader_usage = {
		country_trigger = {
			NOT = { is_country_type = decentralized }
			any_scope_state = {
				state_region = s:STATE_ONTARIO
			}
			OR = {
				c:MTC ?= this
				country_average_culture_pop_acceptance = {
					culture = cu:franco_canadian
					value >= acceptance_status_4
				}
			}
		}
		interest_group_trigger = {
			OR = {
				AND = {
					owner = { country_has_state_religion = rel:catholic }
			   		is_interest_group_type = ig_devout
			   	}
				AND = {
					owner = { NOT = { country_has_state_religion = rel:catholic } }
					is_interest_group_type = ig_rural_folk
				}
			}
		}
		earliest_usage_date = 1853.6.7 # becomes Bishop of St. Boniface
		latest_usage_date = 1879.1.1 # Health begins to decline
		#guaranteed to spawn if possible
	}
}

# Sir Adams George Archibald, Nova Scotian Father of the Confederation, MP and Lt. Gov of Nova Scotia before becoming first Lt. Gov of Manitoba
REPLACE:can_adams_george_archibald = {
	first_name = "Adams_George"
	last_name = "Archibald"
	historical = yes
	role = character_role_politician
	culture = cu:anglo_canadian
	religion = rel:protestant
	birth_date = 1814.5.3 # died 1892.12.14

	interest_group = ig_industrialists
	ideology = ideology_market_liberal
    home_region = STATE_NEW_BRUNSWICK

	traits = {
		arrogant
		imperious
		persistent
		basic_political_operator
	}

	interest_group_leader_usage = {
		country_trigger = {
			NOT = { is_country_type = decentralized }
			OR = {
				c:NVS ?= this
				any_scope_state = {
					is_incorporated = yes
					state_region = s:STATE_NEW_BRUNSWICK
				}
				AND = {
					c:CAN ?= this
					any_scope_state = {
						state_region = s:STATE_ONTARIO
					}
				}
			}
			country_average_culture_pop_acceptance = {
				culture = cu:anglo_canadian
				value >= acceptance_status_4
			}
		}
		interest_group_trigger = {
			OR = {
				is_interest_group_type = ig_petty_bourgeoisie
				is_interest_group_type = ig_landowners
				is_interest_group_type = ig_intelligentsia
				is_interest_group_type = ig_industrialists
			}
		}
		earliest_usage_date = 1851.1.1 # first elected to the Nova Scotia parliament in 1851
		latest_usage_date = 1867.9.20 # last electoral victory, as MP for Montreal East following confederation
		#guaranteed to spawn if possible
	}
}

REPLACE:can_louis_riel = {
	first_name = "Louis"
	last_name = "Riel"
	historical = yes
	female = no
	birth_date = 1844.10.22 # died 1885.11.16
	culture = cu:metis
	religion = rel:catholic
	interest_group = ig_rural_folk
	ideology = ideology_sovereignist_leader
    home_region = STATE_ONTARIO
	traits = {
		imperious
		reckless
		charismatic
		firebrand
	}
	agitator_usage = {
		country_trigger = {
			NOT = { is_country_type = decentralized }
			any_scope_state = {
				state_region = s:STATE_ONTARIO
			}
		}
		interest_group_trigger = {
			is_interest_group_type = ig_rural_folk
		}
		earliest_usage_date = 1868.7.26 # arrival at Red River settlement
		latest_usage_date = 1885.5.15 # Surrender to Canadian forces after the Battle of Batoche
		#guaranteed to spawn if possible
	}
	on_created = {
		# If Louis Riel appears in a world where a Metis nation-state already exists, he will switch for a sovereignist ideology to an ethno-nationalist one
		if = {
			limit = {
				home_country ?= {
					country_has_primary_culture = cu:metis
				}
			}
			set_ideology = ideology:ideology_ethno_nationalist
		}
	}
}

    culture = cu:serb
    female = no
    ideology = ideology_moderate
    home_region = STATE_WESTERN_SERBIA

    interest_group = ig_landowners
    birth_date = 1820.8.19

        literary
        stalwart_defender
        popular_commander
        forest_commander
    }
    commander_usage = {
        country_trigger = {
            c:MON ?= THIS
            has_dlc_feature = ip3_content
        }
        role = general
        earliest_usage_date = 1838.8.19
        latest_usage_date = 1900.8.19
        #guaranteed to spawn if possible
    }
    interest_group_leader_usage = {
        country_trigger = {
            c:MON ?= THIS
            has_dlc_feature = ip3_content
        }
        interest_group_trigger = {
            is_interest_group_type = ig_landowners
        }
        earliest_usage_date = 1838.8.19
        latest_usage_date = 1900.8.19
        #guaranteed to spawn if possible
    }
}

# Marthinus Wessel Pretorius, son of Andries Pretorius, founder of Pretoria, variously president of both Transvaal and the Orange Free State
REPLACE:TRN_marthinus_wessel_pretorius = {
	first_name = "Mathinus_Wessel"
	last_name = "Pretorius"
	historical = yes
	culture = cu:boer
	religion = rel:protestant
	female = no
	interest_group = ig_armed_forces
	ideology = ideology_moderate
	birth_date = 1819.9.17
	home_region = STATE_TRANSVAAL
	traits = {
		ambitious
		reckless
		brave
		popular_commander
	}
	interest_group_leader_usage = {
		country_trigger = {
			OR = {
				c:TRN ?= this
				AND = {
					country_has_primary_culture = cu:boer
					any_scope_state = {
						state_region = s:STATE_TRANSVAAL
					}
				}
				# Will spawn in Oranje only if no Boer state exists in Transvaal
				AND = {
					c:ORA ?= this
					s:STATE_TRANSVAAL = {
						NOT = {
							any_scope_state = {
								owner = { country_has_primary_culture = cu:boer }
							}
						}
					}
				}
			}
		}
		interest_group_trigger = {
			ig_counts_as_marginal = no
			OR = {
				is_interest_group_type = ig_landowners
				is_interest_group_type = ig_armed_forces
				is_interest_group_type = ig_petty_bourgeoisie
			}
			NOR = {
				has_variable = communist_ig_var
				has_variable = chose_vanguardism
			}
		}
		earliest_usage_date = 1853.1.1 # Became Commandant-General of the Transvaal after the death of Andries Pretorius
		latest_usage_date = 1883.1.1 # Retired from politics after Paul Kruger became president of the ZAR/Transvaal
		#guaranteed to spawn if possible
	}
	commander_usage = {
		country_trigger = {
			OR = {
				c:TRN ?= this
				AND = {
					country_has_primary_culture = cu:boer
					any_scope_state = {
						state_region = s:STATE_TRANSVAAL
					}
				}
				# Will spawn in Oranje only if no Boer state exists in Transvaal
				AND = {
					c:ORA ?= this
					s:STATE_TRANSVAAL = {
						NOT = {
							any_scope_state = {
								owner = { country_has_primary_culture = cu:boer }
							}
						}
					}
				}
			}
		}
		role = general
		earliest_usage_date = 1853.1.1
		latest_usage_date = 1883.1.1
		chance = 50
	}
}

		country_trigger = {
			OR = {
				c:TRN ?= this
				AND = {
					country_has_primary_culture = cu:boer
					any_scope_state = {
						state_region = s:STATE_TRANSVAAL
					}
				}
			}
		}
		interest_group_trigger = {
			is_interest_group_type = ig_devout
		}
		earliest_usage_date = 1858.1.1
		latest_usage_date = 1873.1.1
		#guaranteed to spawn if possible
	}
}

# Hercules Crosse Jarvis. Mayor of Cape Town, voice of mercantile interests in the Cape, father-in-law of the Cape's first Prime Minister.
REPLACE:SAF_hercules_crosse_jarvis = {
	first_name = "Hercules"
	last_name = "Jarvis"
	historical = yes
	culture = cu:british
	religion = rel:protestant
	female = no
	interest_group = ig_petty_bourgeoisie
	ideology = ideology_liberal_leader
	birth_date = 1802.6.18
	home_region = STATE_CAPE_COLONY
	traits = {
		pious
		meticulous
		charismatic
		master_bureaucrat
	}
	interest_group_leader_usage = {
		country_trigger = {
			exists = c:SAF
			c:SAF ?= THIS
		}
		interest_group_trigger = {
			OR = {
				is_interest_group_type = ig_petty_bourgeoisie
				is_interest_group_type = ig_industrialists
			}
			NOR = {
				has_variable = communist_ig_var
				has_variable = chose_vanguardism
				has_variable = chose_fascism
				has_variable = chose_ethno_nationalism
			}
		}
		earliest_usage_date = 1840.1.1
		latest_usage_date = 1860.1.1
		#guaranteed to spawn if possible
	}
}

# John Paterson, Cape politician and proponent of making the eastern part of Cape Colony its own colony independent of Cape Town, although still under British suzerainty
REPLACE:SAF_john_paterson = {
	first_name = "John"
	last_name = "Paterson"
	historical = yes
	culture = cu:scottish
	religion = rel:protestant
	female = no
	interest_group = ig_landowners
	ideology = ideology_moderate
	birth_date = 1822.3.15 # Born in March of 1822, unsure of specific date.
	home_region = STATE_CAPE_COLONY
	traits = {
		ambitious
		bigoted		# this man did /not/ like the Xhosa
		innovative
		literary
	}
	interest_group_leader_usage = {
		country_trigger = {
			exists = c:SAF
			c:SAF ?= THIS
		}
		interest_group_trigger = {
			OR = {
				is_interest_group_type = ig_landowners
				is_interest_group_type = ig_industrialists
			}
			NOR = {
				has_variable = communist_ig_var
				has_variable = chose_vanguardism
				has_variable = chose_fascism
				has_variable = chose_ethno_nationalism
			}
		}
		earliest_usage_date = 1845.5.7 # started secretly operating the Eastern Province Herald
		latest_usage_date = 1874.5.1 # the passage of the Seven Circles Act effectively killed Paterson's big political project, the separation of the Eastern Cape from the West
		#guaranteed to spawn if possible
	}
}

### Rulers

REPLACE:SPC_carlos_v_de_borbon_template = { # Carlos María Isidro Benito de Borbón y Borbón-Parma, Count of Molina
    first_name = "Carlos"
    last_name = "de_BorbO_n_Anjou"
    historical = yes
    culture = cu:spanish
    ruler = yes
    birth_date = 1788.3.29
    home_region = STATE_OLD_CASTILE
    dna = dna_carlos_v_de_borbon
    interest_group = ig_landowners
    ideology = ideology_carlist
    traits = {
        ambitious
        persistent
        arrogant
    }
    on_created = {
        set_variable = house_bourbon
        if = {
            limit = {
                owner ?= {
                    has_technology_researched = corporatism
                }
            }
            set_ideology = ideology:ideology_carlist_2
        }
    }
}

    	pious

        country_trigger = {
            c:TRS ?= this
        }
        interest_group_trigger = {
            ig_counts_as_marginal = no
            OR = {
            	AND = {
            		owner ?= {
            			religion = rel:catholic
            		}
		            is_interest_group_type = ig_devout
		        }
	            is_interest_group_type = ig_intelligentsia
	            is_interest_group_type = ig_rural_folk
	        }
        }
        earliest_usage_date = 1843.1.1
        latest_usage_date = 1860.1.1
        #guaranteed to spawn if possible
    }
    agitator_usage = {
        country_trigger = {
            has_dlc_feature = voice_of_the_people_content
            c:TRS ?= this
        }
        interest_group_trigger = {
            ig_counts_as_marginal = no
            OR = {
            	AND = {
            		owner ?= {
            			religion = rel:catholic
            		}
		            is_interest_group_type = ig_devout
		        }
	            is_interest_group_type = ig_intelligentsia

# Romanian revolutionary of 1848 in Transylvania
REPLACE:trs_avram_iancu = {
    first_name = Avram
    last_name = Iancu
    historical = yes
    culture = cu:romanian
    religion = rel:orthodox
    female = no
    interest_group = ig_rural_folk
    ideology = ideology_radical
    birth_date = 1824.9.10 # exact birthdate unknown. died September 10, 1872
    home_region = STATE_NORTHERN_TRANSYLVANIA

        social_bandit
        charismatic

        firebrand
    }

        country_trigger = {
            has_dlc_feature = voice_of_the_people_content
            OR = {
            	c:TRS ?= this
            	AND = {
            		NOT = { exists = c:TRS }
            		c:HUN ?= this
            	}
            }
        }
        interest_group_trigger = {
            ig_counts_as_marginal = no
            is_interest_group_type = ig_rural_folk
        }
        earliest_usage_date = 1848.1.1
        latest_usage_date = 1860.1.1

    }

REPLACE:ald_general_nsoumer = {
	first_name = Lalla_Fatma
	last_name = N_Soumer
	historical = yes
	culture = cu:berber
	female = yes
	religion = rel:sunni
	commander_rank = default
	interest_group = ig_devout
	ideology = ideology_theocrat
	birth_date = 1830.8.21 # estimate
	home_region = STATE_CONSTANTINE
	traits = {
		brave
		charismatic
		stalwart_defender
	}
	commander_usage = {
		country_trigger = {
			AND = {
				OR = {
					AND = {
						exists = c:ALD
						c:ALD ?= THIS
					}
					AND = {
						exists = c:MAS
						c:MAS ?= THIS
					}
					AND = {
						exists = c:CON
						c:CON ?= THIS
					}
					AND = {
						exists = c:AIT
						c:AIT ?= THIS
					}
					AND = {
						exists = c:TUG
						c:TUG ?= THIS
					}
				}
				is_subject = no
				any_scope_state = {
					OR = {
						state_region = s:STATE_ORAN
						state_region = s:STATE_ALGIERS
						state_region = s:STATE_CONSTANTINE
						state_region = s:STATE_SAHARA
					}
				}
				AND = {
					exists = c:FRA
					c:FRA ?= {
						any_scope_state = {
							OR = {
								state_region = s:STATE_ORAN
								state_region = s:STATE_ALGIERS
								state_region = s:STATE_CONSTANTINE
								state_region = s:STATE_SAHARA
							}
						}
					}
				}
			}
		}
		role = general
		earliest_usage_date = 1856.1.1
		latest_usage_date = 1894.1.1
		#guaranteed to spawn if possible
	}
}

# Rulers are valid globally

REPLACE:ruler_karl_marx = { # Ruler Marx
    is_for_ruler_selector = yes
	
	first_name = Karl_Heinrich
	last_name = Marx
	historical = yes
	ig_leader = yes
	interest_group = ig_trade_unions
	female = no
	birth_date = 1818.5.5
	dna = dna_karl_marx
	ideology = ideology_communist
	culture = cu:ashkenazi
	religion = rel:atheist
	home_region = STATE_RHINELAND
	traits = {
		direct
		persistent
		literary
	}
	interest_group_leader_usage = {
        country_trigger = {
        	NOT = { is_country_type = decentralized }
            NOT = {
                has_global_variable = ruler_selector_pool_invalidation_global_var
            }
        }
        interest_group_trigger = {
        	is_marginal = no
            is_interest_group_type = ig_trade_unions
            NOR = {
                has_variable = communist_ig_var
                has_variable = chose_vanguardism
                has_variable = chose_fascism
                has_variable = chose_conservatism
                has_variable = chose_ethno_nationalism
            }
        }
        earliest_usage_date = 1836.1.1
        latest_usage_date = 1836.1.1
        #guaranteed to spawn if possible
    }
}

    last_name = Lovelace
    historical = yes
    ig_leader = yes
    culture = cu:british
    religion = rel:protestant
    interest_group = ig_intelligentsia
    ideology = ideology_moderate

    home_region = STATE_HOME_COUNTIES
    traits = {

        innovative
        literary
        cancer
    }
    interest_group_leader_usage = {
        country_trigger = {
            NOT = { is_country_type = decentralized }
            NOT = {
                has_global_variable = ruler_selector_pool_invalidation_global_var
            }
        }
        interest_group_trigger = {
            is_marginal = no
            is_interest_group_type = ig_intelligentsia
            NOR = {
                has_variable = communist_ig_var
                has_variable = chose_vanguardism
                has_variable = chose_fascism
                has_variable = chose_conservatism
                has_variable = chose_ethno_nationalism
            }
        }
        earliest_usage_date = 1836.1.1
        latest_usage_date = 1836.1.1
        #guaranteed to spawn if possible
    }
}

    culture = cu:british
	interest_group = ig_industrialists
	ideology = ideology_moderate
    home_region = STATE_YORKSHIRE
    # technically a ruler, but will be set as the ruler of BIC via the company
	birth_date = 1784.8.25
	company = company:company_east_india_company
	traits = {
        special_character_colonial_business
		reckless
	}
	trait_generation = {

	}
    executive_usage = {
        country_trigger = { # Must be the country that owns the company
            c:GBR ?= this
        }
        company_trigger = {
            is_company_type = company_type:company_east_india_company
        }
        earliest_usage_date = 1836.1.1
        latest_usage_date = 1849.1.1
        #guaranteed to spawn if possible
    }
}

REPLACE:BIC_JOD_pratap_singh_of_idar = { # later Pratap Singh
    is_general = yes
    first_name = Pratap_Singh
    last_name = Rathore
    historical = yes
    culture = cu:rajput
    religion = rel:hindu
    interest_group = ig_armed_forces # lifelong soldier
    ideology = ideology_royalist
    home_region = STATE_RAJPUTANA
    birth_date = 1845.10.21
    commander_rank = commander_rank_2
    traits = {
        honorable
        brave
        traditionalist_commander
    }
    interest_group_leader_usage = {
        country_trigger = {
            has_dlc_feature = ip2_content

            OR = {
                c:IDA ?= this
                AND = {
                    c:JOD ?= this
                    NOT = { exists = c:IDA }
                }
                AND = {
                    NOR = {
                        exists = c:JOD
                        exists = c:IDA
                    }
                    c:BIC ?= this
                }
            }
        }
        interest_group_trigger = {
            ig_counts_as_marginal = no
            is_interest_group_type = ig_armed_forces
        }
        earliest_usage_date = 1878.1.1 # joined the Jodhpur risala/cavalry
        latest_usage_date = 1902.8.9 # promoted to Major-General
        chance = 50
    }
    commander_usage = {
        country_trigger = {
            has_dlc_feature = ip2_content

            OR = {
                c:IDA ?= this
                AND = {
                    c:JOD ?= this
                    NOT = { exists = c:IDA }
                }
                AND = {
                    NOR = {
                        exists = c:JOD
                        exists = c:IDA
                    }
                    c:BIC ?= this
                }
            }
        }
        role = general
        earliest_usage_date = 1878.1.1 # joined the Jodhpur risala/cavalry
        latest_usage_date = 1902.8.9 # promoted to Major-General
        #guaranteed to spawn if possible
    }
}

	is_agitator = yes
	culture = primary_culture
	religion = rel:catholic
	interest_group = ig_landowners
	ideology = ideology_fascist # Chilean Nazi
    home_region = STATE_SANTIAGO
	birth_date = 1887.5.10
	traits = {
		literary
		bigoted
		firebrand # Not really, but Bigoted is such a decrease in character popularity that it's needed.
	}
    agitator_usage = {
        country_trigger = {
			NOT = {
				has_variable = joaquin_edwards_bello_spawn
			}
			OR = {
				c:CHL ?= THIS
				AND = {
					c:FND ?= THIS
					any_scope_state = {
						state_region = s:STATE_SANTIAGO
					}
				}
				AND = {
					c:PLT ?= THIS
					country_has_primary_culture = cu:south_andean
					any_scope_state = {
						state_region = s:STATE_SANTIAGO
					}
				}
			}
			has_dlc_feature = rp1_content
		}
        interest_group_trigger = {
			is_interest_group_type = ig_landowners
        }
        earliest_usage_date = 1918.1.1
        latest_usage_date = 1936.1.1
        #guaranteed to spawn if possible
    }
	on_created = {
		owner = {
			set_variable = joaquin_edwards_bello_spawn
		}
	}
}

		erudite
        basic_colonial_administrator
		ambitious
		persistent
	}
	agitator_usage = {
		country_trigger = {
            OR = {
                has_dlc_feature = voice_of_the_people_content
                has_dlc_feature = ip2_content
            }
			OR = {
                c:BIC ?= this
                AND = {
                    NOT = { exists = c:BIC }
                    OR = {
                        c:ENG ?= this
                        c:GBR ?= this
                    }
                }
			}
		}
        interest_group_trigger = {
            ig_counts_as_marginal = no
            is_interest_group_type = ig_industrialists
        }
		earliest_usage_date = 1836.1.1
		latest_usage_date = 1865.1.1
		#guaranteed to spawn if possible
	}
}

REPLACE:POR_maria_ii_de_braganca = {

	first_name = "Maria"
	last_name = "de_Braganca"

	ruler = yes
	female = yes
	birth_date = 1819.4.4

		persistent

# Miguelist Line

REPLACE:POR_miguel_i_de_braganca_template = {
	first_name = "Miguel"
	last_name = "de_Braganca"
	historical = yes
	culture = primary_culture
	#dna = dna_king_miguel_i
	birth_date = 1802.10.26
	home_region = STATE_ESTREMADURA
	interest_group = ig_landowners
	ideology = ideology_miguelist
	traits = {
		ambitious
		persistent
	}
    on_created = {
        set_variable = house_braganca
        if = {
            limit = {
                owner ?= {
                    has_technology_researched = corporatism
                }
            }
            set_ideology = ideology:ideology_miguelist_2
        }
    }
}

	}
    on_created = {
        set_variable = house_braganca
        if = {
            limit = {
                owner ?= {
                    has_technology_researched = corporatism
                }
            }
            set_ideology = ideology:ideology_miguelist_2
        }
    }
}

# Prussia - PRU

REPLACE:PRU_otto_von_bismarck = {
	first_name = Otto
	last_name = von_Bismarck
	historical = yes
	role = character_role_politician
	interest_group = ig_landowners
	female = no
	birth_date = 1815.4.1
	home_region = STATE_BRANDENBURG
	dna = dna_otto_von_bismarck
	ideology = ideology_authoritarian
	traits = {
		persistent
		ambitious
		masterful_diplomat
		experienced_political_operator
		demagogue
	}

    interest_group_leader_usage = {
    	country_trigger = {
    		OR = {
				c:PRU ?= this
				was_formed_from = PRU
			}
			country_has_monarchy_law = yes
			has_technology_researched = pan-nationalism
			NOT = {
				has_global_variable = bismarck_variable
			}
    	}
    	interest_group_trigger = {
    	    is_interest_group_type = ig_landowners
    	}
    	earliest_usage_date = 1846.1.1
    	latest_usage_date = 1890.3.18
    	#guaranteed to spawn if possible
    }

	on_created = {
		set_global_variable = bismarck_variable
		owner = {
			trigger_event = { id = german_unification.3 }
		}
	}
}

REPLACE:SPA_maria_fortuny_i_portell = { # Marià Fortuny i Portell
	first_name = MariA_
	last_name = Fortuny_i_Portell
	historical = yes
	female = no
	role = character_role_politician
	culture = cu:catalan
	noble = no
	religion = rel:catholic
	interest_group = ig_landowners
	ideology = ideology_carlist
	birth_date = 1855.6.25
	home_region = STATE_CATALONIA
	traits = {
		pious
		reserved
		basic_political_operator
	}
    interest_group_leader_usage = {
        country_trigger = {
        	OR = {
        		c:SPA ?= this
        		country_has_primary_culture = cu:catalan
        	}
			any_scope_state = {
				state_region = s:STATE_CATALONIA
			}
			has_dlc_feature = ip4_content
        }
        interest_group_trigger = {
			is_interest_group_type = ig_landowners
        }
        earliest_usage_date = 1875.1.1
        latest_usage_date = 1901.12.31
        #guaranteed to spawn if possible
    }
	trait_generation = { }
	on_created = {
        if = {
            limit = {
                owner ?= {
                    has_technology_researched = corporatism
                }
            }
            set_ideology = ideology:ideology_carlist_2
        }
	}
}

REPLACE:tur_koca_mustafa_reshid_pasha = { # Damad (or Damat) Mehmed Asi Pasha, grand vizier in 1852-1853
	first_name = Damad_Mehmed
	last_name = Ali
	historical = yes
	culture = cu:turkish
	female = no
	dna = dna_damat_mehmed_ali_pasha
	religion = rel:sunni
	ideology = ideology_reformer
	interest_group = ig_intelligentsia
	birth_date = 1813.1.1
	home_region = STATE_EASTERN_THRACE
	traits = {
		tactful
	}
	interest_group_leader_usage = {
		country_trigger = {
			exists = c:TUR
			c:TUR ?= THIS
		}
		interest_group_trigger = {
			ig_counts_as_marginal = no
			is_interest_group_type = ig_intelligentsia
			NOR = {
				has_variable = communist_ig_var
				has_variable = chose_vanguardism
				has_variable = chose_fascism
				has_variable = chose_conservatism
				has_variable = chose_ethno_nationalism
			}
		}
		earliest_usage_date = 1845.1.1
		latest_usage_date = 1860.1.1
		chance = 50
	}
}

# Butrus al-Bustani, Lebanese intellectual of the Nahda
REPLACE:tur_butrus_al_bustani = {
	first_name = "Butrus"
	last_name = "al-Bustani"
	historical = yes
	birth_date = 1819.1.11 # Born on an unknown day in January of 1819
	home_region = STATE_SYRIA
	culture = cu:mashriqi
	religion = rel:protestant # Born into a Maronite family, but converted to Protestantism around 1840. Mix of Congregationalist and Presbyterian, look up the National Evangelical Church of Beirut for more on the theology if you're interested.
	interest_group = ig_intelligentsia
	ideology = ideology_reformer
	traits = {
		romantic
		innovative
		aesthete
		literary
	}
	agitator_usage = {
		country_trigger = {
			any_scope_state = {
				state_region = s:STATE_SYRIA
			}
		}
		interest_group_trigger = {
			is_interest_group_type = ig_intelligentsia
		}
		earliest_usage_date = 1861.1.1 # His most major contributions to the Nahda began after the Lebanese civil war of 1860/61.
		latest_usage_date = 1883.5.1 # died May 1st, 1883
		#guaranteed to spawn if possible
	}
}

    first_name = "Michael"

    culture = cu:yankee
    female = no

    ideology = ideology_moderate
    interest_group = ig_rural_folk
    birth_date = 1890.7.14
	home_region = STATE_MICHIGAN
    traits = {
    	charismatic
        cautious
        erudite
    }
    interest_group_leader_usage = {
        country_trigger = {
            exists = c:UOM
            c:UOM ?= THIS
        }
        interest_group_trigger = {
            ig_counts_as_marginal = no
            is_interest_group_type = ig_rural_folk
        }
        earliest_usage_date = 1919.8.19
        latest_usage_date = 1936.1.1
        chance = 50
    }
    on_created = {
        if = {
            limit = {
                owner = {
                    NOT = {
                        has_law_or_variant = law_type:law_slavery_banned
                    }
                }
            }
            set_ideology = ideology:ideology_abolitionist
        }
        else_if = {
            limit = {
                owner = {
                	has_technology_researched = socialism
                	OR = {
	                    has_law_or_variant = law_type:law_no_workers_rights
	                    NOT = { has_law_or_variant = law_type:law_universal_suffrage }
	                }
                }
            }
            set_ideology = ideology:ideology_social_democrat
        }
        else = {
            set_ideology = ideology:ideology_moderate
        }
    }
}

    first_name = Samuel

        reckless
    }
    interest_group_leader_usage = {
        country_trigger = {
            country_has_primary_culture = cu:dixie
            any_scope_state = {
                state_region = s:STATE_MISSOURI
            }
        }
        interest_group_trigger = {
            ig_counts_as_marginal = no
            is_interest_group_type = ig_intelligentsia
        }
        earliest_usage_date = 1865.11.18
        latest_usage_date = 1910.1.1
        chance = 50
    }
    on_created = {
        if = {
            limit = {
                owner = {
                    NOT = {
                        has_law_or_variant = law_type:law_slavery_banned
                    }
                }
            }
            set_ideology = ideology:ideology_abolitionist
        }
        else_if = {
            limit = {
                owner = {
                    any_subject_or_below = {
                        count >= 1
                    }
                }
            }
            set_ideology = ideology:ideology_pacifist
        }
        else_if = {
            limit = {
                owner = {
                    has_technology_researched = feminism
                    NOT = {
                        has_law_or_variant = law_type:law_womens_suffrage
                    }
                }
            }
            set_ideology = ideology:ideology_feminist
        }
        else = {
            set_ideology = ideology:ideology_jingoist_leader
        }
    }
}

# Cristobal Aguilar, last Hispanic mayor of Los Angeles until the election of Antonio Villaraigosa over a century later
# Can appear for any country that owns and has incorporated California (so, mostly likely MEX or USA) and isn't horrible against Californios
# responsible for the creation of Pershing Square (then called La Plaza Abaja) and maintaining public control of LA's growing waterworks system
REPLACE:usa_cristobal_aguilar = {
    first_name = "Cristobal_2"
    last_name = "Aguilar"
    historical = yes
    culture = cu:mexican # Californio
    female = no
    religion = rel:catholic
    role = character_role_politician
    ideology = ideology_moderate
    interest_group = ig_petty_bourgeoisie # Was part of the one of wealthiest landowner families in California at one point, but also he was a mayor and mayors are peak PB, right?
    birth_date = 1814.7.5 # Wikipedia says 1816 with no specific birthdate and no citation, but findagrave lists 5 Jul 1814 and it looks like that was done by a guy who actually read the records of the Old Calvary Cemetery where Aguilar was buried, so I'm going with that
	home_region = STATE_CALIFORNIA
	traits = {
        innovative
        meticulous
        master_bureaucrat
    }
    interest_group_leader_usage = {
        country_trigger = {
            any_scope_state = {
                is_incorporated = yes
                state_region = s:STATE_CALIFORNIA
            }
            country_average_culture_pop_acceptance = {
                culture = cu:mexican
                value >= acceptance_status_4 # Mexico should always pass this check. USA... sometimes.
            }
        }
        interest_group_trigger = {
            is_interest_group_type = ig_petty_bourgeoisie
        }
        earliest_usage_date = 1850.7.3 # Beginning of first term as City Council member after American annexation of California
        latest_usage_date = 1873.12.31 # Beginning of last elected role, served until 1878. Died April 11th, 1886
        chance = 25 # small chance
    }
}

		ambitious
		persistent
	}

		country_trigger = {
			has_dlc_feature = voice_of_the_people_content
			c:FRA ?= this
		}

            ig_counts_as_marginal = no
            OR = {
                is_interest_group_type = ig_intelligentsia
                is_interest_group_type = ig_trade_unions
            }
        }
		earliest_usage_date = 1840.6.30 # first publication of "What is to be Done?""

	}
}

		literary
		demagogue
		charismatic
	}

			}
		}
        interest_group_trigger = {
            ig_counts_as_marginal = no
            OR = {
		        is_interest_group_type = ig_petty_bourgeoisie
		        is_interest_group_type = ig_intelligentsia
		        is_interest_group_type = ig_rural_folk
		    }

	home_region = STATE_ABRUZZO

		hedonist
		literary
		ambitious
	}
	agitator_usage = {
		country_trigger = {
			has_dlc_feature = voice_of_the_people_content
			NOT = {
				has_variable = gabriele_d_annunzio_spawn
			}
			OR = {
				c:ITA ?= this
				AND = {
					c:SIC ?= this
					NOT = { exists = c:ITA }
				}
			}
		}
        interest_group_trigger = {
            ig_counts_as_marginal = no
            OR = {
			    is_interest_group_type = ig_landowners
			    is_interest_group_type = ig_petty_bourgeoisie
			    is_interest_group_type = ig_intelligentsia
			}
        }
		earliest_usage_date = 1899.1.1
		latest_usage_date = 1924.1.1
		#guaranteed to spawn if possible
	}
	on_created = {
		owner = {
			set_variable = gabriele_d_annunzio_spawn
		}
	}
}

		innovative

	agitator_usage = {
		country_trigger = {
			OR = {
				c:NOR ?= this
				AND = {
					NOT = {
						exists = c:NOR
					}
					any_primary_culture = {
						has_discrimination_trait = heritage_nordic
					}
					any_scope_state = {
						OR = {
							state_region = s:STATE_EASTERN_NORWAY
							state_region = s:STATE_EASTERN_NORWAY
						}
					}
				}
			}
		}
        interest_group_trigger = {
            ig_counts_as_marginal = no
			is_interest_group_type = ig_intelligentsia
        }
		earliest_usage_date = 1862.1.1
		latest_usage_date = 1906.1.1

	}

	first_name = Ludwig
	last_name = von_der_Tann
	historical = yes
	culture = cu:south_german
	female = no
	ideology = ideology_moderate
	commander_rank = default
	interest_group = ig_landowners

	home_region = STATE_BAVARIA

		experienced_offensive_planner
		surveyor
	}

		country_trigger = {
			OR = {
				AND = {
					exists = c:BAV
					c:BAV ?= THIS
				}
				AND = {
					NOT = { exists = c:BAV }
					exists = c:GER
					c:GER ?= THIS
					c:GER ?= { owns_entire_state_region = STATE_BAVARIA }
				}
			}
		}

REPLACE:pru_admiral_von_tirpitz = {
	first_name = Alfred
	last_name = von_Tirpitz
	historical = yes
	culture = cu:north_german
	female = no
	dna = dna_alfred_von_tirpitz
	ideology = ideology_ethno_nationalist
	commander_rank = default
	interest_group = ig_armed_forces
	birth_date = 1849.3.19
	home_region = STATE_BRANDENBURG
	traits = {
		ambitious
		dockyard_master
		convoy_raider_commander
	}
	commander_usage = {
		country_trigger = {
			OR = {
				AND = {
					exists = c:PRU
					c:PRU ?= THIS
				}
				AND = {
					NOT = { exists = c:PRU }
					exists = c:GER
					c:GER ?= THIS
					c:GER ?= { owns_entire_state_region = STATE_BRANDENBURG }
				}
			}
		}
		role = admiral
		earliest_usage_date = 1875.1.1
		latest_usage_date = 1920.1.1
		#guaranteed to spawn if possible
	}
}

REPLACE:JAP_kokaku_yamato = {
	# Emperor Kokaku
	first_name = "Kokaku" # Tomohito
	last_name = "Yamato"

	noble = yes

	birth_date = 1771.9.23

	ideology = ideology_traditionalist
	home_region = STATE_KYOTO
	traits = {
		erudite
		literary
		ambitious
	}
	on_created = {
		set_variable = house_yamato
	}
}

REPLACE:JAP_ninko_yamato = {
	# Emperor Ninko
	first_name = "Ninko" # Ayahito
	last_name = "Yamato"
	historical = yes
	noble = yes
	birth_date = 1800.1.1
	role = character_role_emperor_of_japan
	dna = dna_ninko
	religion = rel:shinto
	interest_group = ig_devout # Mostly interested in court rituals and education
	ideology = ideology_moderate
	home_region = STATE_KYOTO
	traits = {
		reserved # not very active in affairs of state
		sickly
		special_character_japanese_emperor
	}
	on_created = {
		set_variable = house_yamato
	}
}

REPLACE:JAP_komei_yamato = {
	first_name = "Osahito" # Later Komei
	last_name = Yamato
	historical = yes
	noble = yes
	birth_date = 1831.1.1
	role = character_role_emperor_of_japan
	dna = dna_emperor_komei
	religion = rel:shinto
	interest_group = ig_armed_forces
	ideology = ideology_shojoi
	home_region = STATE_KYOTO
	traits = {
		wrathful
		sickly
	}
	on_created = {
		set_variable = house_yamato
		if = {
			limit = {
				owner = {
					has_law = law_type:law_bakufu
				}
			}
			add_trait = special_character_japanese_emperor
		}
	}
}

REPLACE:JAP_iemochi_tokugawa = {
	first_name = Yoshitomi # Later Iemochi
	last_name = Tokugawa
	historical = yes
	noble = yes
	culture = cu:japanese
	birth_date = 1846.7.16
	dna = dna_iemochi_tokugawa
	interest_group = ig_landowners
	ideology = ideology_moderate
	home_region = STATE_KANSAI
	role = character_role_magnate
	holding_type = building_manor_house
	on_created = {
		set_variable = house_tokugawa
		if = {
			limit = {
				NOT = {
					has_global_variable = japan_daimyo_abolished
				}
			}
			set_variable = { name = daimyo_var value = s:STATE_KANSAI }
		}
		designate_as_shinpan_daimyo = yes
	}
	trait_generation = {
		add_trait = sickly
		if = {
			limit = {
				game_date <= 1862.1.1
			}
			add_trait = trait_child
		}
		else = {
			add_trait = romantic
			add_trait = innovative
		}
	}
}

			set_variable = { name = daimyo_var value = s:STATE_KYUSHU }
		}

	}

REPLACE:JAP_iwasaki_yataro = { # Iwasaki Yatarō, Mitsubishi

    last_name = Iwasaki

	home_region = STATE_KANTO
    traits = {
        basic_entrepreneur
        persistent
        honorable
    }
    executive_usage = {
		country_trigger = {
			c:JAP ?= this
			has_dlc_feature = mp1_content
		}
		company_trigger = {
			is_company_type = company_type:company_mitsubishi
		}
	    earliest_usage_date = 1870.1.1
	    latest_usage_date = 1885.1.1

	}

# Jhansi - JHN
REPLACE:jhn_rani_of_jhansi = {
	first_name = Lakshmibai
	last_name = Newalkar
	dna = dna_rani_lakshmibai
	historical = yes
	culture = cu:marathi
	female = yes
	religion = rel:hindu
	commander_rank = default
	interest_group = ig_armed_forces
	ideology = ideology_traditionalist
	birth_date = 1828.11.19
	home_region = STATE_AWADH
	traits = {
		cruel
		imposing
		celebrity_commander
	}
	commander_usage = {
		country_trigger = {
			has_dlc_feature = ip2_content
			OR = {
				AND = {
					exists = c:JHN
					c:JHN ?= THIS
				}
				AND = {
					NOT = {
						exists = c:JHN
					}
					any_primary_culture = {
						has_discrimination_trait_group = heritage_group_south_asian
					}
					OR = {
						AND = {
							exists = c:BIC
							has_war_with = c:BIC
						}
						AND = {
							exists = c:GBR
							has_war_with = c:GBR
						}
					}
				}
			}
		}
		role = general
		earliest_usage_date = 1846.1.1
		latest_usage_date = 1875.1.1
		#guaranteed to spawn if possible
	}
}
